_comment: Per-year visual variants of the Brighton Ruby thumbnail style. Copy an entry, bump the year, and tweak the palette to make a NEW variant. Anything omitted falls back to `default`. `bg` is a top-to-bottom gradient; set `from`===`to` for a flat colour. `glow` adds a radial highlight (great for dark themes). `headshotSide` places the speaker photo left or right. `ringColors` cycle across the playlist-cover headshot grid. `badge` is either "label" (small YEAR · TALK text, top-right) or "circle" (a round year badge, bottom).
